_comment: The opening — plays once on the very first join of a fresh pack world, right after the auto-install provisions it (AutoInstall dispatches cutscene play opening). The camera lifts from outside Mom's house (2607.5/109/2847.5), drifts high over Sango Town, glances toward the lab hill (2674.5/128/2901.5), and settles back at the door. Amnesiac tone — the town remembers the player; the player does not. Never names the Founder. TODO(showrunner): nudge keyframes to the town skyline; retitle to taste.
